Artifact Stat

Eligible levels50-80
Approx. type odds0.29%among eligible artifact types

How To Use It

Power regen is the readable effect family. The value range applies the same display multipliers used by the game artifact tooltip, so it is easier to compare with in-game rolls.

Recycles Into

MaterialQty
Engine Part20-30
Hydrogen Spill20-30

Related Artifact Variants

  • Power Generator
  • Exceptional Power Generator
